name: Sprout Sandwich with Tofu Ricotta

ingredients.item: sun-dried tomatoes packed in oil, drained (save the oil)
oil or reserved oil from the sun-dried tomatoes
extra-firm tofu, drained, pressed (page 17), and crumbled

method: Place all the pesto ingredients in a small food processor, starting with the spinach. Process until well blended.
Place all the ricotta ingredients in a small food processor. Process until well blended.

Spread a thick layer of the tofu ricotta on two bread slices. Spread pesto on the other two bread slices. Divide the sprouts, tomato, and onion and place on the ricotta. Top with the pesto slice. Slice each sandwich into fourths in triangle shapes.
